# logging-and-commit

log.format.timestamp, commit.server, and commit.author.* settings

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/cmd-params/logging-and-commit` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  commit.author.name: Argo CD
  commit.author.email: argocd@example.com
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
data:
  log.format.timestamp: rfc3339
  commit.server: argocd-commit-server:8086
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  commitServer:
    address: argocd-commit-server:8086
    commit:
      author:
        email: argocd@example.com
        name: Argo CD
  controller: {}
  logging:
    formatTimestamp: rfc3339
  repoServer: {}
  server: {}
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  commit.author.email: argocd@example.com
  commit.author.name: Argo CD
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  commit.server: argocd-commit-server:8086
  log.format.timestamp: rfc3339
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```
